description: Verify package is properly removed from node_modules after uninstall

checks.name: uninstall-verify
checks.label: Uninstall Verification
checks.description: Check that package is completely removed from node_modules directory
checks.pass: Package directory no longer exists in node_modules/

failure.userMessage: Package uninstall verification failed. Package still exists in node_modules. Verify npm uninstall ran successfully and node_modules are in consistent state.
